title: Alberta K-6 curriculum draft controversy
notes: March 30 2021 — K-6 curriculum draft released. Janet French/CBC. 7,000 parents join Facebook opposition group in first 24 hours. Lessons on ancient Rome, Genghis Khan, Chinese dynasties for Grade 2 called age-inappropriate. Parents/teachers concerned about Eurocentric framing, Christian bias, removal of Indigenous content, lack of teacher input. Protests planned outside legislature. Correct primary source for EVT-055. Date note: March 30 (not March 29 as previously noted).
